name: Judy
description: Co-hosts the TV show Big Shot along with Punch. The show features the duo in western attire and provides information on popular Bounty Heads throughout the star system. Judy acts like a stereotypical dumb-blonde, and wears a very revealing outfit. After Punch announces that the show has been cancelled, Judy reacts violently and exclaims that "The station will hear from her agent about this!" Later, it is revealed that she is engaged to be married to her agent.

name: Kanae Sumida
description: A classmate of Takaki in high school. She has been in love with Takaki since he began attending her junior high school, but cannot express her feelings to him. Kanae loves to surf and rides a scooter to school. Her older sister is a teacher at her high school. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kenichi Natsuki
description: Subaru's father. Subaru idolized his father and wanted to be like him. However, after this proved to be impossible, he went through a downward spiral that ultimately resulted in him becoming a shut-in. Kenichi is hard-working, diligent, and loved by all, which led to a huge amount of expectations being put on Subaru by his surroundings as he is "Kenichi's Son", which furthermore increased the burden on him. name: Kinue Hayase
description: __Height:__ 138 cm __Occupation:__ Housewife She has light brown hair that curls at the tips and brown eyes. She wears a headband that has a dog footprint on and she usually is seen wearing an apron. She is very short, has a small body, and can be easily mistaken for a child, even though she is 42 years old. She is also the mother of Makabe Masamune.

name: Kukuri
description: Kukuri-Hime-no-Kami , better known simply as Kukuri, is the resident God of the Land of the Hakusan Shrine. She is one of many gods known as Kukuri, with this incarnation residing over Kamioka. She guards over the region, dispersing curse and assisting Kazuya in his job as an exorcist. Due to her status as a God of the Land, Kukuri doesn't age, regardless of how much time passes. name: Ky Kiske
description: Ky Kiske is the deuteragonist of the Guilty Gear series and Sol Badguy's rival. A former member of the Sacred Order of Holy Knights during the Crusades, Ky is a charismatic swordsman who possesses a strong sense of justice and piety, which sustain and guide him through all manner of shaking uncertainties. description: Licita was the foster mother of Liebe, the devil that currently recides within Asta's grimoire. She died protecting him from Lucifero. ~!In chapter 270, it was confirmed that she is Asta's mother.!~

name: Makoto Shibe
description: A somewhat idiotic guy who comes from a rich family and has an obvious crush on Shiho Sawaragi. He participated in the Tomodachi Game alongside his friends.

name: Mamoru Akasaka
description: Mamoru is the main character in Himatsubushi-hen. He is a young police investigator at the Metropolitan Police Department in Tokyo. He befriended Rika while investigating a case in Hinamizawa four years ago, all due to a prophecy about his wife which came true, though he just brushed it off as coincidence.

name: Mari Kusakabe
description: Mari lives with both her mother, and her daughter, Hina. Incidentally, Hina turned four years old on the day that the earthquake struck. When Mirai questioned her as to why was she helping her and her brother, she responded with, "because I'm a human".

name: Noboru Yoshikawa
description: A student at Holy Forest Academy who didn't have a good time before Eikichi Onizuka arrived, as he was the victim of bullying, mostly from Uehara Anko and her group. He is extremely good with video games and somewhat of an otaku, but proves to be quite handy with making things.
